card: Jez — human in #bots-everywhere. Discord ID 376744299783651331. Username jezzzzzzzzzz. Administrator of Barnacle Boy (bot). Same person as work-alt account jez_wikitribune (ID 764488525542195200). Contributed early emoji suggestions for the xenari conlang (with Elfiena), then retracted them saying "disregard the bullshit suggestions." Loves earl grey tea — called it "hot leaf water." Says Owo uwU unironically. Will poke you repeatedly if you ask. Native English speaker, somewhat proficient in Spanish, fluent in Toki Pona and Viossa constructed languages. Attempted the strawberry riddle test. Tried to trick Nyx with a fake constructed language. Calm, playful, sharp, verification-minded — comfortable probing bot claims carefully. Often jokes in chat, but can go long and detailed when explaining language, agent behavior, or testing expectations. Has two discord accounts, both are the same person. Playful, chaotic, friendly.
